Paragraph.Sentence: Which of the following is not a geometric sequence?

response.feedback: That's correct! You have selected the sequence that is not geometric.
From among a set of options, the student correctly identified which sequence was not geometric.
Sorry, that's incorrect. The sequence 3, 9, 27, 81, ... is geometric. Each term is equal to the previous term times three, so this is a geometric sequence with a common ratio of 3.
The student was not able to identify a non-geometric sequence from among a set of options.
Sorry, that's incorrect. The sequence 2, 4, 8, 16, ... is geometric. Each term is equal to the previous term times two, so this is a geometric sequence with a common ratio of 2.
The student was not able to identify a non-geometric sequence from among a set of options.
Sorry, that's incorrect. The sequence 5, 15, 45, 135, ... is geometric. Each term is equal to the previous term times three, so this is a geometric sequence with a common ratio of 3.
The student was not able to identify a non-geometric sequence from among a set of options.
